cat > /tmp/test_imo_1990_p3.lean << 'LEAN'
import Mathlib
set_option maxHeartbeats 400000000
open BigOperators Real Nat Topology Rat

private lemma order_arg {n q : ℕ} (hq : Nat.Prime q) (hqn : q ∣ n)
    (hodd : Odd n) (h_sq : n ^ 2 ∣ 2 ^ n + 1) (hq3 : 3 ≤ q) :
    ∃ k, orderOf (2 : ZMod q) = 2 * k ∧ k ∣ n ∧ k < q := by
  haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime q) := ⟨hq⟩
  have hq_dvd : q ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 := dvd_trans (dvd_trans hqn (dvd_pow_self n (by omega))) h_sq
  have h2ne : (2 : ZMod q) ≠ 0 := by
    intro h; have : ((2 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by push_cast at h ⊢; exact h
    rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this; exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) this) (by omega)
  have h2n_neg1 : (2 : ZMod q) ^ n = -1 := by
    have h0 : ((2 ^ n + 1 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by rwa [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff]
    exact eq_neg_of_add_eq_zero_left (by push_cast at h0; exact h0)
  have hord_dvd_2n : orderOf (2 : ZMod q) ∣ 2 * n := by
    apply orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one; show (2 : ZMod q) ^ (2 * n) = 1
    rw [mul_comm, pow_mul, h2n_neg1]; ring
  have hord_ndvd_n : ¬ orderOf (2 : ZMod q) ∣ n := by
    intro h; rw [orderOf_dvd_iff_pow_eq_one.mp h] at h2n_neg1
    have : ((2 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by
      have := congr_arg (· + 1) h2n_neg1; simp at this; exact_mod_cast this
    rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this; exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) this) (by omega)
  have hord_dvd_pm1 : orderOf (2 : ZMod q) ∣ q - 1 := ZMod.orderOf_dvd_card_sub_one h2ne
  have hd_even : 2 ∣ orderOf (2 : ZMod q) := by
    by_contra hne; exact hord_ndvd_n (((Nat.coprime_comm.mp (Nat.coprime_two_left.mpr
      ((Nat.even_or_odd _).elim (fun he => absurd he.two_dvd hne) id))).dvd_of_dvd_mul_right
      (by rwa [mul_comm])))
  obtain ⟨k, hk_eq⟩ := hd_even
  exact ⟨k, hk_eq,
    (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_iff_left (by norm_num : 0 < 2)).mp (by rwa [← hk_eq]),
    by have := Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega) hord_dvd_pm1; omega⟩

private lemma ord2_dvd3 {q : ℕ} [Fact (Nat.Prime q)] (h : orderOf (2 : ZMod q) = 2) : q ∣ 3 := by
  have h4 : (2 : ZMod q) ^ 2 = 1 := by rw [← h]; exact pow_orderOf_eq_one _
  have h4' : (4 : ZMod q) = 1 := by push_cast at h4 ⊢; ring_nf; ring_nf at h4; exact h4
  have : ((3 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by
    have : (3 : ZMod q) = 0 := by
      have h3 : (4 : ZMod q) - 1 = 0 := by rw [h4']; ring
      push_cast at h3 ⊢; ring_nf; ring_nf at h3; exact h3
    exact this
  rwa [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this

private lemma ord6_dvd9 {q : ℕ} [Fact (Nat.Prime q)] (h : orderOf (2 : ZMod q) = 6) : q ∣ 9 := by
  have h6 : (2 : ZMod q) ^ 6 = 1 := by rw [← h]; exact pow_orderOf_eq_one _
  have h3ne1 : (2 : ZMod q) ^ 3 ≠ 1 := fun hh =>
    absurd (orderOf_dvd_of_pow_eq_one hh) (by rw [h]; omega)
  have h23 : (2 : ZMod q) ^ 3 = -1 := by
    have hsq : ((2 : ZMod q) ^ 3) ^ 2 = 1 := by
      calc ((2 : ZMod q) ^ 3) ^ 2 = (2 : ZMod q) ^ 6 := by ring
      _ = 1 := h6
    rcases mul_eq_zero.mp (show ((2 : ZMod q) ^ 3 + 1) * ((2 : ZMod q) ^ 3 - 1) = 0 from
      by linear_combination hsq - 1) with hh | hh
    · exact eq_neg_of_add_eq_zero_left hh
    · exact absurd (sub_eq_zero.mp hh) h3ne1
  have : ((9 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by
    have : (2 : ZMod q) ^ 3 + 1 = 0 := add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg.mpr h23
    push_cast at this ⊢; ring_nf; ring_nf at this; exact this
  rwa [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this

private lemma primes_le3 {n : ℕ} (hn : 2 ≤ n) (hodd : Odd n) (h_sq : n ^ 2 ∣ 2 ^ n + 1)
    (hv3 : padicValNat 3 n ≤ 1) : ∀ q, Nat.Prime q → q ∣ n → q ≤ 3 := by
  suffices ∀ q, (∀ r, r < q → Nat.Prime r → r ∣ n → r ≤ 3) → Nat.Prime q → q ∣ n → q ≤ 3 from
    fun q => Nat.strongRecOn q this
  intro q ih hq hqn
  by_contra hgt; push_neg at hgt
  haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime q) := ⟨hq⟩
  obtain ⟨k, hk_ord, hk_dvd, hk_lt⟩ := order_arg hq hqn hodd h_sq (by omega)
  have hk_odd : ¬ 2 ∣ k := fun h2 =>
    absurd (dvd_trans h2 hk_dvd) (by obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hodd; omega)
  -- Show k ≤ 3
  have hk_le3 : k ≤ 3 := by
    by_contra hk4; push_neg at hk4
    -- k ≥ 5 (odd, ≥ 4)
    have hkmf := Nat.minFac_prime (show k ≠ 1 by omega)
    have hkmf_dvd : k.minFac ∣ n := dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd k) hk_dvd
    have hkmf_lt : k.minFac < q := lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.minFac_le (by omega)) hk_lt
    have hkmf_le3 := ih _ hkmf_lt hkmf hkmf_dvd
    have hkmf_ne2 : k.minFac ≠ 2 := fun h2 => by
      rw [h2] at hkmf_dvd
      exact absurd hkmf_dvd (by obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hodd; omega)
    have hkmf3 : k.minFac = 3 := by have := hkmf.two_le; omega
    have h3k : 3 ∣ k := hkmf3 ▸ Nat.minFac_dvd k
    haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime 3) := ⟨by norm_num⟩
    have hv3k : padicValNat 3 k ≤ 1 := le_trans
      ((padicValNat_dvd_iff_le (show n ≠ 0 by omega)).mpr (dvd_trans pow_padicValNat_dvd hk_dvd))
      hv3
    -- k / 3 ≥ 2 (k ≥ 5, 3 | k ⟹ k ≥ 6 ⟹ k/3 ≥ 2)
    have hk3ge2 : k / 3 ≥ 2 := by omega
    have hk3_dvd_n : k / 3 ∣ n := dvd_trans (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3k) hk_dvd
    have hk3mf := Nat.minFac_prime (show k / 3 ≠ 1 by omega)
    have hk3mf_dvd : (k/3).minFac ∣ n := dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd _) hk3_dvd_n
    have hk3mf_lt : (k/3).minFac < q :=
      lt_of_le_of_lt (le_trans (Nat.minFac_le (by omega)) (Nat.div_le_self k 3)) hk_lt
    have hk3mf_le3 := ih _ hk3mf_lt hk3mf hk3mf_dvd
    have hk3mf_ne2 : (k/3).minFac ≠ 2 := fun h2 => by
      rw [h2] at hk3mf_dvd
      exact absurd hk3mf_dvd (by obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hodd; omega)
    have hk3mf3 : (k/3).minFac = 3 := by have := hk3mf.two_le; omega
    have h3_dvd_k3 : 3 ∣ k / 3 := hk3mf3 ▸ Nat.minFac_dvd _
    have h9k : 9 ∣ k := by
      have : 3 * 3 ∣ 3 * (k / 3) := Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 3 h3_dvd_k3
      rwa [Nat.mul_div_cancel' h3k] at this
    have : padicValNat 3 k ≥ 2 :=
      (padicValNat_dvd_iff_le (show k ≠ 0 by omega)).mp (by rw [show (9:ℕ) = 3^2 from by norm_num] at h9k; exact h9k)
    omega
  -- k ≤ 3, odd, > 0
  have hk_pos : k > 0 := by
    rcases k with _ | k
    · exfalso; simp at hk_ord
      have h2ne : (2 : ZMod q) ≠ 0 := by
        intro h; have : ((2 : ℕ) : ZMod q) = 0 := by push_cast at h ⊢; exact h
        rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this; exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) this) (by omega)
      have := ZMod.orderOf_dvd_card_sub_one h2ne
      rw [hk_ord] at this; simp at this; omega
    · omega
  -- k ∈ {1, 3}
  have : k = 1 ∨ k = 3 := by omega
  rcases this with rfl | rfl
  · -- k = 1, ord = 2
    exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (ord2_dvd3 hk_ord)) (by omega)
  · -- k = 3, ord = 6
    have := ord6_dvd9 hk_ord
    exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (hq.dvd_of_dvd_pow (show q ∣ 3^2 from by
      rw [show (9:ℕ) = 3^2 from by norm_num] at this; exact this))) (by omega)

theorem imo_1990_p3 (n : ℕ) (h₀ : 2 ≤ n) (h₁ : n ^ 2 ∣ 2 ^ n + 1) : n = 3 := by
  have hodd : Odd n := by
    by_contra hne; rw [Nat.not_odd_iff_even] at hne
    have h2n := Even.two_dvd hne
    exact (fun h : 2 ∣ 2 ^ n + 1 => by
      obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h; obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := dvd_pow_self 2 (show n ≠ 0 by omega); omega)
      (dvd_trans (dvd_pow h2n (show (2 : ℕ) ≠ 0 by omega)) h₁)
  -- minFac = 3
  have hmf3 : n.minFac = 3 := by
    have hp := Nat.minFac_prime (show n ≠ 1 by omega)
    haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime n.minFac) := ⟨hp⟩
    have hpn := Nat.minFac_dvd n
    have hp3 : 3 ≤ n.minFac := by
      have : n.minFac ≠ 2 := fun h => by
        rw [h] at hpn; exact absurd hpn (by obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hodd; omega)
      exact by have := hp.two_le; omega
    obtain ⟨k, hk_ord, hk_dvd, hk_lt⟩ := order_arg hp hpn hodd h₁ hp3
    have hk_le1 : k ≤ 1 := by
      by_contra hge; push_neg at hge
      have hmfp := Nat.minFac_prime (show k ≠ 1 by omega)
      have := Nat.minFac_le_of_dvd hmfp.two_le (dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd k) hk_dvd)
      exact absurd this (by have := Nat.minFac_le (show 0 < k by omega); omega)
    have hk_pos : k > 0 := by
      rcases k with _ | k
      · exfalso; simp at hk_ord
        have h2ne : (2 : ZMod n.minFac) ≠ 0 := by
          intro h; have : ((2 : ℕ) : ZMod n.minFac) = 0 := by push_cast at h ⊢; exact h
          rw [ZMod.natCast_eq_zero_iff] at this
          exact absurd (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) this) (by omega)
        have := ZMod.orderOf_dvd_card_sub_one h2ne
        rw [hk_ord] at this; simp at this; omega
      · omega
    have : orderOf (2 : ZMod n.minFac) = 2 := by omega
    exact le_antisymm (Nat.le_of_dvd (by norm_num) (ord2_dvd3 this)) hp3
  have h3_dvd : 3 ∣ n := hmf3 ▸ Nat.minFac_dvd n
  haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime 3) := ⟨by norm_num⟩
  have h_lte : padicValNat 3 (2 ^ n + 1) = 1 + padicValNat 3 n := by
    have h := padicValNat.pow_add_pow (p := 3) (x := 2) (y := 1)
      (by decide) (by norm_num) (by norm_num) hodd
    simp only [one_pow] at h; rw [h]; congr 1; native_decide
  have hv_ineq : 2 * padicValNat 3 n ≤ padicValNat 3 (2 ^ n + 1) := by
    rw [← padicValNat.pow 2 (show n ≠ 0 by omega),
        ← padicValNat_dvd_iff_le (show 2 ^ n + 1 ≠ 0 by positivity)]
    exact dvd_trans pow_padicValNat_dvd h₁
  have hv_le1 : padicValNat 3 n ≤ 1 := by omega
  have hno5 := primes_le3 h₀ hodd h₁ hv_le1
  have hv_ge1 : 1 ≤ padicValNat 3 n := one_le_padicValNat_of_dvd (by omega) h3_dvd
  suffices h : n / 3 = 1 by omega
  by_contra hm
  have hm2 : n / 3 ≥ 2 := by omega
  have hmfp := Nat.minFac_prime hm
  have hmf_dvd : (n/3).minFac ∣ n := dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd _) (dvd_trans (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3_dvd) (dvd_refl n))
  have hmf_le3 := hno5 _ hmfp hmf_dvd
  have hmf_ne2 : (n/3).minFac ≠ 2 := fun h2 => by
    rw [h2] at hmf_dvd; exact absurd hmf_dvd (by obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := hodd; omega)
  have hmf3' : (n/3).minFac = 3 := by have := hmfp.two_le; omega
  have h3_dvd' : 3 ∣ n / 3 := hmf3' ▸ Nat.minFac_dvd _
  have h9n : 9 ∣ n := by
    have : 3 * 3 ∣ 3 * (n / 3) := Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left 3 h3_dvd'
    rwa [Nat.mul_div_cancel' h3_dvd] at this
  have : padicValNat 3 n ≥ 2 :=
    (padicValNat_dvd_iff_le (show n ≠ 0 by omega)).mp
      (by rw [show (9:ℕ) = 3^2 from by norm_num] at h9n; exact h9n)
  omega

cat > /tmp/test_check.lean << 'LEAN'
import Mathlib

-- Fix 1: v_3(k) ≤ v_3(n) from k | n
example (k n : ℕ) [Fact (Nat.Prime 3)] (hkn : k ∣ n) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    padicValNat 3 k ≤ padicValNat 3 n := by
  rcases eq_or_ne k 0 with rfl | hk
  · simp
  · exact (padicValNat_dvd_iff_le hn).mpr (dvd_trans pow_padicValNat_dvd hkn)

-- Fix 2: when ord = 2*1 = 2, how does it interact with rw?
-- The issue is hk_ord : orderOf (2 : ZMod q) = 2 * k
-- When k = 1: hk_ord becomes orderOf ... = 2 * 1 = 2
-- But rcases/subst with rfl should substitute k = 1 into hk_ord
-- The error "hk_ord ?a✝ is a proof of False" suggests omega is being confused

-- Fix 3: (n/3).minFac ∣ n from (n/3).minFac ∣ (n/3) and (n/3) ∣ n
-- The issue is my code writes dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd _) (dvd_trans (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3_dvd) (dvd_refl n))
-- Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3_dvd : n / 3 ∣ n. So:
-- dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd (n/3)) (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3_dvd) : (n/3).minFac ∣ n
example (n : ℕ) (h3 : 3 ∣ n) : (n/3).minFac ∣ n :=
  dvd_trans (Nat.minFac_dvd (n/3)) (Nat.div_dvd_of_dvd h3)

LEAN
cd /home/vincent/miniF2F-lean4 && source ~/.elan/env 2>/dev/null && timeout 120 lake env lean /tmp/test_check.lean 2>&1 | tail -10

import Mathlib

-- v_p(k) ≤ v_p(n) from k | n
-- Use: p^v_p(k) | k | n → p^v_p(k) | n → v_p(k) ≤ v_p(n)
example (k n : ℕ) [Fact (Nat.Prime 3)] (hkn : k ∣ n) (hn : n ≠ 0) (hk : k ≠ 0) :
    padicValNat 3 k ≤ padicValNat 3 n := by
  rw [← padicValNat_dvd_iff_le hn]
  exact dvd_trans pow_padicValNat_dvd hkn
